Improve the timeout limit of backend runtime unittest from 15 min -> 18 min due to we added mixed chunked prefill before.
mmlu accuracy: 0.71 -> 0.705.

vllm.title: [Feature][Hardware][Amd] Add fp8 Linear Layer for Rocm
vllm.author: charlifu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds fp8 linear layer support on Rocm.

Use torch.float8_e4m3fnuz for fp8 data type for rocm, and update the fp8 conversion kernels accordingly.
Adjust the weight from torch.float8_e4m3fn to torch.float8_e4m3fnuz after weight loading, and adjust the scaling factor as well.
Since rocm uses to

vllm.title: [Kernel] W8A16 Int8 inside FusedMoE
vllm.author: mzusman
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
🚀  The feature, motivation and pitch
Additional feature for fused_moe triton kernel to support W8A16 with Int8, supports Ampere/Ada lovelace/Hopper, called ExpertsInt8.
Based on symmetric per-column per-expert Int8 quantization, casting the weights to FP16/BF16 before matmul inside the fused_moe ker

vllm.title: [Kernel] fix types used in aqlm and ggml kernels to support dynamo
vllm.author: bnellnm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
For aqlm, make codebook_partition_sizes into a List[int].  This is because pytorch can't dispatch an op with mixed cuda/cpu Tensors.  It is also more in line with the other quantization methods.
Specify type of empty Tensor in gptq.py so that it is the same on both branches of an if statement.
Repla

vllm.title: [Model] Align nemotron config with final HF state and fix lm-eval-small
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes the failing lm-eval-small test by switching to a more stable model checkpoint. It turns out nvidia changed the checkpoint tokenizer to something that is not valid for lm-eval's use, and this is what broke us in #7602.
I noticed the final HF Nemotron config switched from using rope_percent or r

I deleted is_custom_op_supported in a previous PR but it was still being used here.  I've changed the check so that it will work w/o is_custom_op_supported.
cc @youkaichao , @mgoin, @SageMoore

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Clear engine reference in AsyncEngineRPCServer
vllm.author: ruisearch42

This is needed to clean up executor resources such as ray actors. This PR fixes test_pipeline_parallel.py CI failures.

vllm.title: [aDAG] Unflake aDAG + PP tests
vllm.author: rkooo567
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
aDAG doesn't work with asyncio's cancel API because of how it is implemented (asyncio cancel only remoes tasks from event loop while it is awaiting. aDAG asyncio read just creates a new thread and read the shared memory buffer, and it is actually not cancelled)
when a server gets a sigterm, it zerom

vllm.title: [Bugfix] add >= 1.0 constraint for openai dependency
vllm.author: metasyn
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Old versions of the openai package don't have the types module, which can cause errors at import time. This PR updates the requirements-common.txt to ensure that its at least version 1.0 or greater
FIX #7608
